subcodes.first_line: O Hibatu'llah! The Most Exalted Pen proclaimeth: Thy letter hath come into Our presence and hath been adorned with the light of the gaze of the Lord of Power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای هبه الله قلم اعلی میفرماید کتابت لدی الوجه حاضر و بانوار نظر مالک قدر مزین
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
